title: virtual field for computed full_name
prompt: Build MyApp.Accounts.Person with first_name, last_name, and a virtual field :full_name. In the changeset, use put_change to set full_name = first_name <> " " <> last_name. The :full_name field must have `virtual: true` and must never appear in the cast list. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/person.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires virtual field + put_change + exclusion from cast. Sonnet sometimes casts the virtual.
